title: grossularia alpestris
intro: Grossularia alpestris, also known as Bearberry or Kinnikinnick, is a low-growing, evergreen shrub native to North America. Its medicinal properties are attributed to its high concentration of arbutin, a natural compound with antibacterial and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Grossularia alpestris include its ability to act as a diuretic, reducing urinary tract infections and preventing kidney stones, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve cardiovascular health. Grossularia alpestris can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, and is often used in herbal remedies to support urinary tract health and overall well-being.
